interfaces.name: Tradition
interfaces.signature: enum Tradition: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case hindu, jain, universal }

interfaces.name: PracticeType
interfaces.signature: enum PracticeType: String, Codable { case aarti, meditation, mantra, journaling }

interfaces.name: Practice
interfaces.signature: struct Practice: Identifiable, Codable { let id: String; let title: String; let tradition: Tradition; let type: PracticeType; let durationSeconds: Int; let audioAssetName: String?; let textContent: String? }
interfaces.notes: Bundled static content, decoded from JSON catalog

interfaces.name: LearningPath
interfaces.signature: struct LearningPath: Identifiable, Codable { let id: String; let title: String; let tradition: Tradition; let modules: [LearningModule] }

interfaces.name: LearningModule
interfaces.signature: struct LearningModule: Identifiable, Codable { let id: String; let title: String; let order: Int; let lessons: [Lesson] }

interfaces.name: Lesson
interfaces.signature: struct Lesson: Identifiable, Codable { let id: String; let title: String; let content: String; let linkedPracticeID: String? }

interfaces.name: PracticeSessionRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class PracticeSessionRecord { var id: UUID; var practiceID: String; var date: Date; var durationCompleted: Int; var completed: Bool }

interfaces.name: StreakRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class StreakRecord { var currentStreak: Int; var longestStreak: Int; var lastPracticeDate: Date?; var freezesAvailable: Int }

interfaces.name: UserProfile
interfaces.signature: @Model final class UserProfile { var selectedTradition: Tradition; var dailyGoalMinutes: Int; var reminderTime: Date?; var subscriptionActive: Bool }

interfaces.name: JournalEntry
interfaces.signature: @Model final class JournalEntry { var id: UUID; var date: Date; var text: String; var moodTag: String? }

interfaces.name: LessonProgressRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class LessonProgressRecord { var lessonID: String; var unlocked: Bool; var completed: Bool; var completedDate: Date? }
interfaces.notes: SwiftData join table between static Lesson content and user progress

interfaces.name: ContentCatalogLoading
interfaces.signature: protocol ContentCatalogLoading { func loadPractices() throws -> [Practice]; func loadLearningPaths() throws -> [LearningPath] }
interfaces.notes: Decodes bundled JSON; throws on malformed content for error-state UI

interfaces.name: StreakServicing
interfaces.signature: protocol StreakServicing { func recordPractice(on date: Date) async; func currentStreak() -> Int; func useFreeze() -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Backs StreakRecord; freeze/reset edge cases are the core unit-test target

interfaces.name: ProgressServicing
interfaces.signature: protocol ProgressServicing { func isUnlocked(lessonID: String) -> Bool; func completeLesson(lessonID: String) async }

interfaces.name: AudioPlaybackServicing
interfaces.signature: protocol AudioPlaybackServicing { func play(assetName: String) async throws; func stop() }

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduling
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduling { func scheduleDailyReminder(at time: Date) async throws; func cancelReminder() }

interfaces.name: SubscriptionManaging
interfaces.signature: protocol SubscriptionManaging { var isSubscribed: Bool { get }; func purchase(productID: String) async throws; func restorePurchases() async }

interfaces.name: HomeViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class HomeViewModel { var todaysPractice: Practice?; var streak: Int; var loadState: LoadState<Void> }

interfaces.name: PracticeSessionViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class PracticeSessionViewModel { var practice: Practice; var isPlaying: Bool; func start() async; func complete() async }

interfaces.name: LearningPathViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class LearningPathViewModel { var path: LearningPath; var lessonProgress: [String: LessonProgressRecord] }

interfaces.name: ProfileViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ProfileViewModel { var profile: UserProfile; func updateReminder(_ time: Date) async }

interfaces.name: LoadState
interfaces.signature: enum LoadState<T> { case idle, loading, loaded(T), failed(Error) }
interfaces.notes: Generic state used by every screen for empty/loading/success/error

interfaces.name: AppError
interfaces.signature: enum AppError: Error, LocalizedError { case contentLoadFailed, audioUnavailable, notificationDenied, purchaseFailed }
interfaces.notes: Shared error type surfaced in error-state views
